title: Add AudioWorkletNode to legacy default fingerprinting set
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Source: #1154 review item R26 (datadir/review-1154.md:279-285).

## Problem
The legacy default fingerprinting set (`"collection_fingerprinting"` token →
`js_instrumentation_collections/fingerprinting.json`) is missing `AudioWorkletNode`, a real
fingerprinting-relevant audio API.

## Goal
- Add `AudioWorkletNode` to `js_instrumentation_collections/fingerprinting.json` (the legacy
  `collection_fingerprinting` default).
- Ensure the MIRRORED stealth default produced by R5 (Python-side `stealth_fingerprinting.json`)
  ALSO includes `AudioWorkletNode`, so legacy and stealth defaults stay in sync.

## Notes
- `AudioWorkletNode` is interface-typed, so stealth instruments it via the prototype — no
  detectability cost.
- Small change. Natural home is the R5 defaults rework (this issue relates to / is blocked by
  the R5 issue). Future-PR, not #1154-blocking.
